name: wauth-saas-jit
description: Request just-in-time, time-limited SaaS access for an AI agent through the WAUTH SaaS JIT control plane (AFPS) — reads are free; a production grant needs a human passkey, a privileged/admin grant needs passkey + iProov liveness; the grant is auto-revoked and reconciled, and the agent never holds the provisioned credential.
